mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools run moved `### Infrastructure Setup` to the requested Core Features location, but dropped the sibling `### Rollback Procedure` subsection under `## Deployment Guide`, producing heading-tree, block-order, and block-text mismatches.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap with the target `### Infrastructure Setup` subsection still under `## Deployment Guide`; the trace eventually assembled the intended part order in `/tmp/new_readme.txt` but did not apply it back to the benchmark input before MAX_TURNS_EXCEEDED.

gap.rejection_reason: The candidate produced a raw +100pp hybrid-minus-unix result labeled AST-structural, but the mdtools seed failed, so the family cannot satisfy the T10 promotion gate requiring at least one mdtools win.

notes: The same normalized task shape can be solved by hybrid while mdtools-only drops a sibling subsection, reinforcing the prior hybrid-only rescue pattern from C-T10-26.
The unix failure was expensive but not a shell-quoting failure: the agent formed a plausible range-extraction/reassembly plan and ran out of turns before finalizing the target file.
